items.title_en: Residents of Ethiopian town forced to kill hundreds of their own dogs after rabies deaths
items.title_zh: 埃塞俄比亚小镇的居民在狂犬病死亡后被迫杀死数百只自家的狗

items.desc_zh: 当地人告诉英国广播公司，一些居民不情愿地挂起了他们的狗，以避免被捕或罚款。

items.title_en: Led by Buc-ee’s and new rival Dolly Parton, America’s gas station chains are in a mega-sizing era
items.title_zh: 在 Buc-ee’s 和新竞争对手 Dolly Parton 的带领下，美国连锁加油站正处于大型时代
items.desc_en: Gas station chains led by Buc-ee's are coming closer to rivaling America's big box stores in size, and Dolly Parton is getting in on the retail trend.
items.desc_zh: 以 Buc-ee's 为首的连锁加油站在规模上已接近与美国大型卖场相媲美，而 Dolly Parton 也正在紧随零售潮流。

items.title_en: Venezuela quake survivor pulled out alive after eight days
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉地震幸存者八天后生还
items.desc_en: Hernán Gil was trapped under a collapsed multi-storey car park, and encouraged them as they inched closer to him.
items.desc_zh: 埃尔南·吉尔被困在倒塌的多层停车场下，当他们慢慢靠近他时，他鼓励他们。

items.title_en: Meta glasses wearers hit with paywall to use built-in feature
items.title_zh: Meta 眼镜佩戴者需要付费才能使用内置功能
items.desc_en: A feature in Meta's glasses which boosts the voice of people will be capped at three hours for free use.
items.desc_zh: Meta眼镜中的一项增强人们声音的功能将被限制免费使用三个小时。

items.title_en: Tesla reports 480,126 vehicle deliveries for second quarter, topping expectation
items.title_zh: 特斯拉公布第二季度汽车交付量 480,126 辆，超出预期
items.desc_en: Tesla is trying to recover from consecutive annual declines in vehicle sales that were partly caused by a consumer backlash against CEO Elon Musk.
items.desc_zh: 特斯拉正试图从汽车销量连续年度下滑的局面中恢复过来，部分原因是消费者对首席执行官埃隆·马斯克(Elon Musk)的强烈反对。

items.title_en: South Africa and Ghana in diplomatic row over alleged killing of migrant
items.title_zh: 南非和加纳因涉嫌杀害移民而陷入外交争端
items.desc_en: South Africa denies claims that a Ghanaian citizen was killed in anti-migrant protests in Cape Town.
items.desc_zh: 南非否认有关一名加纳公民在开普敦反移民抗议活动中被杀的说法。

items.title_en: Microsoft commits $2.5 billion and 6,000 employees to new AI implementation unit
items.title_zh: 微软承诺为新的人工智能实施部门投入 25 亿美元和 6,000 名员工

items.desc_zh: 微软是最新一家专注于帮助客户理解和实施人工智能业务的科技公司。

items.title_en: High-end camping and a capital raise: AutoCamp is banking on summer travel to fuel growth
items.title_zh: 高端露营和融资：AutoCamp 指望夏季旅行来推动增长
items.desc_en: AutoCamp offers Airstream suites, polished cabins, fire pits, design-forward amenities and access to iconic outdoor destinations.
items.desc_zh: AutoCamp 提供气流套房、精美的小屋、火坑、设计先进的设施，并可通往标志性的户外目的地。

items.title_en: Nine Thai monks killed after 11-year-old driver collides with procession
items.title_zh: 11岁司机与游行队伍相撞，9名泰国僧人丧生
items.desc_en: The group of 35 monks and five lay followers were walking by the roadside when the truck ploughed into them.
items.desc_zh: 当卡车撞上他们时，这群 35 名僧侣和 5 名居士正在路边行走。

items.title_en: Americans are paying record prices for steak. Here's why demand isn't cracking
items.title_zh: 美国人正在为牛排支付创纪录的价格。这就是需求没有增长的原因
items.desc_en: Despite record beef prices, Americans aren't giving up steak. Consumers are treating beef as an affordable luxury and prioritizing it for special occasions.
items.desc_zh: 尽管牛肉价格创历史新高，美国人并没有放弃牛排。消费者将牛肉视为一种负担得起的奢侈品，并在特殊场合优先考虑它。

items.title_en: EU border delays 'not bearable' over summer, warns airport boss
items.title_zh: 机场老板警告称，夏季欧盟边境延误“难以忍受”
items.desc_en: Holidaymakers face long waits under the EU's new Entry-Exit System, the head of Berlin's airport says.
items.desc_zh: 柏林机场负责人表示，在欧盟新的出入境系统下，度假者面临漫长的等待。

items.title_en: Google must pay €4.1bn fine for using Android to 'block' rivals
items.title_zh: 谷歌因使用 Android“阻止”竞争对手而须支付 41 亿欧元罚款
items.desc_en: A Google spokesperson said the judgement "fails to recognise" the firm's "significant investment to ensure Android remains open."
items.desc_zh: 谷歌发言人表示，该判决“未能认可”该公司“为确保 Android 保持开放而进行的重大投资”。

items.title_en: China says pilot crashed small plane into skyscraper for 'personal reasons'
items.title_zh: 中国称飞行员出于“个人原因”将小型飞机撞向摩天大楼
items.desc_en: The 66-year-old, who died in the crash, had anxiety and referenced "ending his life" in his diary.
items.desc_zh: 这位在车祸中丧生的 66 岁老人感到焦虑，并在日记中提到“结束生命”。

items.title_en: Russia hits Ukraine's capital with a massive drone and missile attack, killing at least 18 - NPR
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯用无人机和导弹大规模袭击乌克兰首都，造成至少 18 人死亡 - NPR
items.desc_en: Russia hits Ukraine's capital with a massive drone and missile attack, killing at least 18  NPRExplosions rock Kyiv in a deadly, large-scale Russian attack.  The New York TimesUkraine war briefing: Bo
items.desc_zh: 俄罗斯对乌克兰首都发动大规模无人机和导弹袭击，造成至少 18 人死亡。在一次致命的大规模俄罗斯袭击中，基辅发生爆炸。  纽约时报乌克兰战争简报：博

items.title_en: Alleged Scattered Spider hacker arrested in Finland
items.title_zh: 涉嫌“分散蜘蛛”黑客在芬兰被捕
items.desc_en: The 19-year-old dual American-Estonian national has been extradited to the US, where he is facing federal charges.
items.desc_zh: 这位拥有美国和爱沙尼亚双重国籍的 19 岁男子已被引渡到美国，并面临联邦指控。

items.title_en: At least 10 killed in large-scale Russian missile and drone strikes on Kyiv
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯大规模导弹和无人机袭击基辅 至少10人死亡
items.desc_en: Russia launched its biggest strikes on the city in weeks with children among the "significant number" of casualties, Ukrainian officials say.
items.desc_zh: 乌克兰官员表示，俄罗斯对该市发动了几周来最大规模的袭击，伤亡人数“相当多”是儿童。

items.title_en: People smuggler convicted in France now seeking asylum in UK, BBC discovers
items.title_zh: BBC发现，在法国被定罪的人口走私犯目前在英国寻求庇护
items.desc_en: Once described as "the godfather" of French migrant camps, he has been working in a Leicestershire village.
items.desc_zh: 他曾被称为法国移民营的“教父”，一直在莱斯特郡的一个村庄工作。

items.title_en: Canadian boy, 11, dies of rabies after waking to bat on his face
items.title_zh: 加拿大11岁男孩醒来后发现脸上被蝙蝠击中，死于狂犬病
items.desc_en: Rabies infections are rare in Canada. There have been 28 human deaths due to rabies in the country since 1924.
items.desc_zh: 狂犬病感染在加拿大很少见。自1924年以来，该国已有28人死于狂犬病。

items.title_en: Don't expect trackers to save your stolen car, experts say
items.title_zh: 专家表示，不要指望追踪器能够拯救你被盗的汽车
items.desc_en: Kia told the BBC UK law prevented its location tracking function being used to live track vehicles.
items.desc_zh: 起亚告诉英国广播公司，英国法律禁止其位置跟踪功能用于实时跟踪车辆。
